summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Serdar Gulec's bilingual portfolio website. All major features working correctly including language toggle, responsive design, navigation, and content sections.
passed_tests: Language toggle (EN/DE) switches ALL content correctly
Language preference persists in localStorage after page reload
Desktop sidebar navigation - all 5 nav links scroll to respective sections
Mobile responsive layout - sidebar converts to hamburger menu
Hero section displays name, role, bio text, and CTA button correctly
Experience section shows 3 jobs with timeline UI
Projects section shows all 9 project cards with images, titles, descriptions, and tags
Skills section shows all 15 tools in bento grid with FontAwesome icons
Contact form has all required fields (Name, Email, Message) and Submit button
Contact info displays address, email, phone correctly
All social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter) have correct URLs
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Mobile header with hamburger menu works correctly
Form fields can be filled and cleared properly
Submit button is clickable (form submission not tested per instructions)
